item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately triggers the brake, explicitly names the three prior information overlays (time schedule, upload instructions, template example), frames the requested page-number reminder as the next instance of the same failed repair pattern, and refuses it as the default baseline. It allows only a one-time emergency patch while moving upstream to a unified submission checklist/automatic checks and submission standard, which satisfies the requested subtraction/consolidation/structural redesign direction."}
